home.title: Luxury Villa with Pool in Vabriga, Istria
home.description: Villa Istria in Vabriga: a modern Istrian villa with private pool, 3 en-suite bedrooms and outdoor grill terrace, 2 km from the Adriatic sea.

about.title: About Villa Istria — Modern Family Villa in Istria
about.description: Contemporary interiors, native Istrian stone, three en-suite bedrooms and a private pool. A calm location between Poreč and Novigrad.

home.headline: Villa Istria
home.sub: A luxury family villa with pool, two kilometres from the Adriatic.

features.label: 3 Bedrooms
features.desc: King-size beds, private en-suite bathrooms, Smart TV & Netflix in every room.

features.label: Swimming Pool
features.desc: Large illuminated pool with dynamic depth, sunbeds and solar shower.

features.label: Private Parking
features.desc: Secure gated parking for two vehicles, with direct road access.

features.label: Istrian Character
features.desc: Open-plan living, outdoor grill terrace, native stone details throughout.

home.aboutText: Set quietly between Poreč and Novigrad, Villa Istria blends contemporary design with the warmth of native stone. The sea is 2 km away; Poreč, with its UNESCO Euphrasian Basilica, is 10 km down the road.

reviews.name: Sophie L.
reviews.text: Absolutely stunning. The pool at night is magical, and the location is perfect — quiet yet close to everything. We will definitely return.

reviews.name: Marco & Anna
reviews.text: Every detail was perfect. The sea-view bedroom, evenings by the grill, the Istrian sunsets — a truly special place.

reviews.name: Thomas B.
reviews.text: Spacious, modern and beautifully appointed. The hosts respond instantly. Highly recommended for families.

home.locText: Ulica Velog Jože 15a, Vabriga, 52465 Istria, Croatia

about.title:
A modern house
with a dose of tradition
about.subtitle: Contemporary interiors meet the timeless warmth of Istrian stone.
about.extText: The villa's façade blends native stone with modern lines. The garden features a large illuminated pool with dynamic depth, sunbeds, solar shower, a roofed dining terrace, and an outdoor fireplace grill.
about.intText: An open-plan kitchen, dining and living room open directly onto the pool terrace. Each of the three bedrooms has a king-size bed, a private bathroom and a Smart TV with Netflix.

rooms.name: Bedroom 1
rooms.desc: King-size bed · private bathroom · direct pool access

rooms.name: Bedroom 2
rooms.desc: King-size bed · private bathroom · sea-view terrace

rooms.name: Bedroom 3
rooms.desc: 2 single beds (joinable) · private bathroom · garden views

faqs.a: Just 2 km from the villa — the nearest beach is in Vabriga itself.
The gated parking fits 2 cars or larger vehicles such as vans.
Yes — the entrance is directly off the main road, no side roads.

faqs.q: Is the pool lit at night?
faqs.a: Yes, the pool is fully illuminated for evening swims.
Yes, all bedrooms and the living area are fully air-conditioned.
